corrections.location: Daniel 11:10, line beginning καὶ ὁ υἱὸς αὐτοῦ
corrections.current:
καὶ ὁ υἱὸς αὐτοῦ καὶ ἐρεθισθή-
σεται
corrections.correct:
καὶ οἱ υἱοὶ αὐτοῦ καὶ ἐρεθισθή-
σονται
corrections.note: Image clearly reads plural οἱ υἱοὶ αὐτοῦ ... ἐρεθισθήσονται, not singular.

corrections.current: ταράξει πολλοὺς καὶ οὐ μὴ φοβηθῇ
corrections.correct: ταράξει πολλοὺς καὶ οὐ μὴ φοβηθῇ.
corrections.note: Full stop visible at end of verse sentence before 13καὶ.
Apparatus clearly has του ποιησαι συνομολογαι.
Apparatus prints καταρρυῶν; transcript dropped omega and accenting. Main issue is wrong letters.
The apparatus as printed reads εξελενσεται, with nu, not εξελευσεται.
Printed apparatus reads πολιν, not πολυν.

notes: Running head matches. Body largely correct aside from the clear singular/plural error at v.10 and minor punctuation. Apparatus mostly correct, but a few readings are miscopied; no clear siglum issues beyond those noted.
